name: Dill Cream Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Sour cream or plain yogurt
recipeInstructions: Combine all ingredients in a bowl. Season with salt and pepper to taste. For a tangier flavor, add more mustard and a splash of lemon juice. If the dressing is too thick, stir in milk or cream until desired consistency is reached. Chill for at least one hour before serving.
